name: Butterscotch Pudding Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook over high heat until the MILNOT dissolves and the mixture boils.
2. Stir constantly until the mixture reaches a temperature of 234°F (113°C).
3. Remove from heat.
4. Add pecans.
5. Stir by hand until the mixture begins to thicken and lose some gloss.
6. Drop onto waxed paper.
